description: Visit every Service NSW centre in the Eastern Suburbs play area that has street-front access on a main road. Shopping-centre branches do not count — no detours into Westfield.

eligibility_rules.notes: Learners practise approaching a government service centre on a real street, finding parking, and rejoining traffic. No need to enter the shop.

excluded_locations.name: Bondi Junction Service Centre
excluded_locations.address: Shop G2, 19-23 Hollywood Avenue, Bondi Junction
excluded_locations.reason: Inside Westfield Bondi Junction — shopping-centre branch.

excluded_locations.name: Eastgardens Service Centre
excluded_locations.address: Shop 227/9B, Level 2, Westfield Eastgardens, 152 Bunnerong Road

locations.name: Wynyard Service Centre
locations.description: CBD street-front Service NSW on York Street — busy city traffic and pedestrian crossings.
locations.supervisor_notes: Practise kerb approach and lane discipline; no need to go inside. Off-peak first visit.

locations.name: Haymarket Service Centre
locations.description: Ground-floor centre on Rawson Place near Darling Harbour — street access, not a mall.
locations.supervisor_notes: Watch for trams, tour buses, and heavy foot traffic near Chinatown.

locations.name: Darlinghurst Service Centre
locations.description: Inner-city Crown Street frontage — common eastern-corridor access point.
locations.supervisor_notes: Good link between CBD practice and Eastern Suburbs drives; watch for narrow lanes.

locations.name: Redfern Service Centre
locations.description: Street-front centre on Redfern Street — suburban main road, not a shopping complex.
locations.supervisor_notes: Practise parallel parking or kerbside stop nearby if continuing the lesson.

locations.name: Botany Service Centre
locations.description: Purpose-built street-level centre on Lord Street — also a driving-test hub for southern Sydney.
locations.supervisor_notes: Easiest stamp on the trail. On-site parking; good for practising approach and exit on a main road.

_meta.coordinate_note: Bounding boxes are approximate for v1. Verify on-site before production.
_meta.scope_note: Only Service NSW centres inside the Eastern Suburbs play envelope with street-front access are eligible. Bondi Junction and Eastgardens are deliberately excluded.
_meta.nearest_mall_branches: Learners needing Bondi Junction or Eastgardens should park at street level and walk in — that visit does not count for this trail.
